name: The School District of Lee County
districtFact: The School District of Lee County serves Fort Myers, Cape Coral, Lehigh Acres, Bonita Springs, and Southwest Florida communities where school calendar planning often includes hurricane season, coastal travel, and seasonal tourism schedules.

about.title: About The School District of Lee County
about.content: The School District of Lee County publishes instructional calendars with pre-school week, first and last student days, holidays, professional duty days, early dismissal days, quarter and semester dates, FTE weeks, breaks, and severe weather make-up windows.

about.title: How to Use This Lee County Calendar
about.content: This page summarizes the official Lee County instructional calendar PDFs in a searchable format. Families should still confirm school-specific orientation, testing, athletics, graduation, and emergency schedule changes through Lee Schools and their assigned campus.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for Lee County Families
content: Watch severe weather make-up windows because the district notes that the school calendar may shift after extended severe weather days.
Track professional duty days separately because they are no-school days for students.
Add early dismissal dates to family calendars because they change pickup, transportation, and after-school care timing.
Check the official Lee Schools calendar page before booking travel around spring break, winter break, and the end of the school year.

customSections.label: Lee County Planning Insights for 2026-2027
customSections.content: Lee County families often need to plan school breaks around Southwest Florida weather, seasonal travel, and work schedules. These notes translate the official calendar into practical planning checkpoints without replacing the district source.

groups.label: Travel windows
items: Thanksgiving Break gives families a full Monday-through-Friday school break from November 23-27, 2026.
Winter Break runs December 21, 2026 through January 1, 2027, but students should also account for the January 4 professional duty day before classes resume.
Spring Break is shorter than a full five-day school week: March 22-25, 2027 is followed by Good Friday on March 26.

groups.label: Weather and schedule risk
items: The official calendar lists June 1-4, 2027 as severe weather make-up days, so families should avoid treating those dates as guaranteed summer travel days until the district confirms they are not needed.
Lee County's hurricane-season planning makes the official district calendar and school-level alerts especially important for late changes.
Early dismissal dates on December 18, March 19, and May 27 can affect bus timing, after-school care, and parent pickup schedules.

customSections.label: Lee County School Calendar by Community
customSections.content: The School District of Lee County serves families across Fort Myers, Cape Coral, Lehigh Acres, Bonita Springs, Estero, North Fort Myers, and nearby Southwest Florida communities. This district calendar is the central planning reference for those communities, but individual campuses may publish separate orientation, testing, athletics, graduation, and program schedules.

compareIntro: Compare the Lee County school calendar with other Florida district calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Dates shown include the first day, last day, and spring break.

districtFaqs.q: How should Lee County families use severe weather make-up days when planning travel?
districtFaqs.a: Treat June 1-4, 2027 as tentative planning dates until Lee Schools confirms whether severe weather make-up days are needed. Avoid non-refundable travel on those dates if the school year has been affected by major closures.

districtFaqs.q: Does this calendar apply to every Lee County school campus?
districtFaqs.a: This page summarizes the district instructional calendar. Individual schools may publish separate orientation, testing, athletics, graduation, and program calendars, so families should confirm campus-specific events with their assigned school.

districtFaqs.q: Are professional duty days school days for students?
districtFaqs.a: No. Lee County marks professional duty days as no-school days for students.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify last-minute Lee County calendar changes?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official Lee Schools instructional calendar page and school-level announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with Lee Schools.

relatedDistricts.name: Pinellas County Schools
relatedDistricts.comparisonNote: Gulf Coast district with similar storm-season calendar planning concerns.

relatedDistricts.name: Hillsborough County Public Schools
